creator: joneum@FreeBSD.org
text:
I've had trouble publishing commititts for days. It fails from several tested servers. I've been getting this message for 1 hour now, I've tried it about 10 times.

"svn-commit.5.tmp" 32 lines, 1325 characters
svn: E170013: Commit failed (details follow):
svn: E170013: Unable to connect to a repository at URL 'svn+ssh://repo.freebsd.org/ports/head/www/gohugo'
svn: E210002: To better debug SSH connection problems, remove the -q option from 'ssh' in the [tunnels] section of your Subversion configuration file.
svn: E210002: Network connection closed unexpectedly
svn: E170013: Your commit message was left in a temporary file:
svn: E170013:    '/usr/home/joneum/dev/ports/www/svn-commit.5.tmp'
